title: feat: prune PWA capability playground and keep product RM flows
motivation: The PWA capabilities playground mixes product behavior with generic browser demos, causing product-scope drift and maintenance overhead.
behaviour:
Remove generic capability demo cards and retain only PRD-required RM flows (meeting recording, transcription pathing, transcript handling).

Code examples:

```tsx
// remove generic demo cards
<NotificationDemoCard />
<StorageDemoCard />
<CameraDemoCard />
<MicDemoCard />
```

```tsx
// keep product-focused mobile flows
<MeetingRecordingFlow />
<TranscriptReviewFlow />
```

in: Delete or retire generic PWA demo cards and platform playground framing.
Preserve and harden PRD-aligned RM recording/transcription flows.
Update route labels and docs so mobile UX is product-oriented, not demo-oriented.
out: Re-architecture of transcription backends beyond current PRD requirements.

acceptance_criteria: No generic capability-demo cards are shown in the RM mobile surface.
Recording/transcription product flows remain functional for edge and worker paths.
Mobile UX copy and routing describe product behavior rather than demo behavior.
test_plan: Run web component/unit tests for PWA pages and transcription helpers.
Manual mobile smoke test: record -> transcribe -> upload transcript path still works.
Verify removed demo-card imports/components do not remain referenced in build output.
